name: New Claim - Website Navigation Help
description: Non-web-savvy caller struggles to find the form on the site.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: Okay I'm on the website but I don't see any warranty form anywhere.
expectedOutcome: Agent gives precise, patient navigation: greenbeanbattery.com > 'Warranty' at the top right > 'Submit a Claim', read instructions, form link at the bottom of the page. Repeats/slows down if needed.
